builtins.doc: Add two numbers or concatenate two strings.
Subtract b from a.
Multiply two numbers.
Divide a by b. Integer division truncates toward zero.
Integer remainder of a divided by b.
Structural equality: true if a and b are equal.
Structural inequality: true if a and b differ.
True if a is strictly less than b.
True if a is strictly greater than b.
True if a is less than or equal to b.
True if a is greater than or equal to b.
Logical AND of two booleans.
